name: La Gata Maula Vermuteria
summary: Women-run vermouth bar and tapas in Caldes de Malavella
description: Charming vermuteria on Carrer Major run by Gemma and Joana — wide vermouth selection with homemade tapas and a terrace; about 20 min drive south of Girona

name: Espresso Mafia
summary: Specialty coffee roaster in Girona old town
description: Best match for a serious coffee stop near Casa Cacao and directly in the La Fabrica coffee orbit

name: La Fàbrica Girona
description: Great breakfast and cycling café vibe with the exact style reference you already like

name: Hors Catégorie
description: Good backup for bike culture vibes though less of a pure specialty coffee priority than Espresso Mafia or La Fàbrica

name: La Carpa
summary: Beloved toy store in Girona old town
description: Personal favourite toy store on Carrer de les Hortes — already flagged in the Jul 2 shopping block

name: Nomad Coffee Passatge Sert
summary: Top specialty coffee near Yurbban Passage
description: Probably the best first coffee stop from the hotel with serious third wave coffee and easy access

name: TosTao Casa Bonay
summary: Stylish hotel café near Yurbban Passage
description: Good polished café option with a nicer setting and easy walk from the hotel

name: Three Marks Coffee
description: Best as a short destination walk when you want a more coffee nerd focused stop

name: Petit Nomad
summary: Compact Nomad stop near Plaça Catalunya
description: Useful if walking toward Plaça Catalunya or the central shopping area

name: Satan's Coffee Corner
description: Iconic third wave option but check current location fit before prioritizing over Nomad

name: Nordest Cafè
summary: Best modern café candidate in Puigcerdà
description: Closest fit for a nicer café stop in Puigcerdà with brunch and coffee positioning

name: Café del Llac
description: Practical choice near Hotel Villa Paulita for an easy morning coffee by the lake

name: Pastisseria Gil
description: Better as a bakery stop than a specialty coffee destination

name: Café de Londres
description: Use as the simple town café option before or after Pyrenees rides

name: Boulangerie Grange
description: Good enough pre ride option when coffee quality matters less than convenience

name: Mumu Ursus Coffee Shop
description: Better café vibe than Arreau proper but requires a short drive toward Saint-Lary-Soulan

name: L'Alchimiste
description: Best match for fancier serious coffee near the center and worth prioritizing

name: KURO Espresso Bar
description: Good quick serious coffee stop while moving around central Bordeaux

name: Café Piha
summary: Cozy artisan coffee and pastry stop
description: Good relaxed café option near the historic center

name: Black List Café
description: Useful near Place Pey Berland when sightseeing or shopping

name: Café Nuances Marais
summary: Design forward specialty café in the Marais
description: Probably the best match for fancier coffee shop near Grand Hôtel Malher

name: Partisan
description: Good sit down option with a modern atmosphere and strong neighborhood fit

name: Fragments
description: Strong neighborhood coffee option that is easy to combine with wandering the Marais

name: Ob-La-Di
description: Good quick stop for coffee and light breakfast in a polished small space

name: Boot Café
description: Best as a quick espresso stop rather than a long sit down café

name: Loustic
description: Useful if walking north of the hotel toward the Haut Marais

name: Galeries Lafayette Haussmann
summary: Paris department store option for the final full day
description: Classic grand magasin stop for a flexible Paris shopping block

name: Le Bon Marché
summary: Left Bank department store option for the final full day
description: Flexible Paris shopping stop on the Left Bank

name: Hermès Faubourg Saint-Honoré
summary: Leather appointment attempt option in Paris
description: Try for a Hermès leather appointment around Rue du Faubourg Saint-Honoré / 24 FBG if desired

name: Louis Vuitton Maison Vendôme
summary: Optional luxury shopping stop in Paris
description: Optional luxury shopping idea at Louis Vuitton Maison Vendôme

name: Raima
summary: Europe's largest paper and art supply store with rooftop vermouth bar
description: Six-floor art supply and stationery store in an 18th-century Gothic Quarter building; rooftop Nimura bar has terrace views — very close to Yurbban Passage on Carrer de Trafalgar

name: TDF Fan Park — Passeig de Lluís Companys
summary: Official Tour de France fan park on the boulevard next to the hotel
description: Free fan park on Passeig de Lluís Companys (Arc de Triomf area) open July 2–5 from 10am–8pm; giant screens show every stage live plus cycling activities and sponsor spaces. The Stage 1 TTT also passes through here — essentially on the hotel's doorstep.
